workflows.title: Clay SEMrush/Ahrefs Stack Displacement
workflows.description: 7-stage LLM pipeline in Clay: role mapping, SEO intel pull, gap analysis, AI search gap analysis, strategic positioning, email hook generation. Per-contact personalized copy at scale. Replaces 6+ hrs/batch manual research with sub-30-min automated pass.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh
steps: SEO intel: SEMrush/Ahrefs API pull per domain
Gap analysis: keyword + traffic opportunity delta
AI search gap: LLM identifies content blind spots
Strategic positioning: angle selection per persona
Email hook: personalized first line + body

workflows.title: Clay Webhook-to-HubSpot Enrichment
workflows.description: Product sign-up webhook fires into Clay, enriches contact and company in real-time, classifies email type (personal/work/role), scores via AI rubric (0-100), syncs tiered result to HubSpot with routing context. Qualification: 48h to under 4 hours.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh
steps: Email type classify: personal / work / role-based
HubSpot sync with tier + routing context
Tiered outreach: T1 HeyReach, T2-T3 Instantly

workflows.title: Omnibound Signal-to-Pipeline
workflows.description: 60-column Clay workflow: competitive intel, live AI citation proof, persona-gated copy, purple-safety validator, n8n push to Smartlead and HeyReach. 144 E1 variants.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Pre-Send List Quality Gate
workflows.description: Grade any lead list A+ to F across 8 dimensions before Smartlead upload. n8n blocks below grade B and alerts Slack.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Weekly Deliverability Audit
workflows.description: SPF, DKIM, DMARC per domain, Smartlead inbox health, 1% reply rule. Cron Monday, Slack report.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Founder-Led Content Loop
workflows.description: Capture LinkedIn engagers, score Hot/Warm/Nurture, warm outbound referencing their interaction, mine calls for next post.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: NeevCloud Content Quality Gate
workflows.description: Six-check gate for 80 posts/week: near-duplicate, cannibalisation, structure, readability, claims, confidentiality. PASS/FLAG/FAIL before CMS.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Signal-Led Email Cadences
workflows.description: 23 YAML cadences: trigger signals, persona, vertical, stage. MiniMax generates personalized hook per lead.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: AI Lead Scorer
workflows.description: Score lead lists 0-100 with Claude. Firmographic, technographic, behavioral composite for tier routing.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Cold Outreach Message Framework (Context Engine)
workflows.description: Rasul-owned messaging system: first line (relevancy/observation/recency), 1-4 body blocks, single CTA, optional P.S., 80-word gate. personalizer + 23 cadences + Clay formulas + col 60 PASS.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Cold Email Personalizer
workflows.description: Playwright scrape plus Claude. One hyper-personalized email per company URL in under 30 seconds.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Clay Formula Library
workflows.description: Six production IIFEs: lead scoring, ICP fit, email quality, categorization, personalization hooks, reply intent.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Clay 9-Step Enrichment (90%+ Coverage)
workflows.description: Upload, company enrich, people enrich, email waterfall, verification, phone, Claygent custom data, scoring, CRM export. 85%+ email coverage vs 40% single finder.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: 6 Buying Signals (Ranked by Correlation)
workflows.description: Former customers, new leadership, high-intent website, tech stack change, expansion, hiring/downsizing. Prioritize outreach by signal strength.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: New Team Members Play
workflows.description: Reference new hire by name. Best timing 2-4 weeks after hire. Shows attention to their growth.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Skills-Targeting Play
workflows.description: Target LinkedIn skills not just titles. Salesforce skill leads to Salesforce add-ons. Python skill leads to dev tools.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Leaving Employees Play
workflows.description: Position around coverage gap after departure. Outreach 1-2 weeks after team member leaves.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Bad Reviews Targeting Play
workflows.description: Scrape negative G2/Capterra reviews, reference their pain, offer alternatives. Outreach within days of review.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: ServiceBell Allbound Play
workflows.description: Visitor hits pricing, SDR calls in 2 min, email if no answer, LinkedIn next day. Real-time intent activation.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Inbound Followers Play
workflows.description: Monitor daily LinkedIn followers, filter to ICP via Clay, outreach within 24-48h. 25-30% reply rate on warm intent.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Signal Sourcer Master Workflow
workflows.description: 9 sub-skills: job changes, funding, hiring, website visitors, company events, tech changes, competitor signals, content engagement, multi-signal scoring. 35-40% reply rates on signal-led (production).
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Cold Email Master Skill
workflows.description: 7 sub-skills: ATL/BTL messaging, first touch, follow-up, personalization, re-engagement, subject lines. Plus 34 templates library.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: List Building Master Workflow
workflows.description: Define ICP (100pt scoring), source companies, find contacts, qualify accounts, clean/validate (<1% bounce), deduplicate. Built for 100K+ emails/month.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: n8n GTM Automation
workflows.description: Workflow design, webhooks, error handling, Clay bidirectional sync, CRM automation, self-hosting. Production GTM orchestration patterns.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: GTM Flywheel 2026 (Context Engine)
workflows.description: Fused workflows.io flywheel: 6 layers mapped to gtm-founder-led-loop, gtm-email-cadences, gtm-ai-lead-scorer, gtm-neevcloud-content-gate. Traffic to retention loop.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Signal Activation (Context Engine)
workflows.description: Fused workflows.io 11-step playbook: capture to Clay, multi-signal tier scoring, list B+ gate, HubSpot sync, HeyReach/Smartlead activate. Not a link - runnable.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Product Sign-Up (Context Engine)
workflows.description: Fused workflows.io PLG playbook: Clay webhook, enrich, email classify, gtm-ai-lead-scorer tiers, HubSpot sync, HeyReach T1 / Instantly T2-T3.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Outbound Attribution 2026 (Context Engine)
workflows.description: Fused workflows.io attribution playbook: log every Smartlead/HeyReach touch in HubSpot, tag outbound-influenced signups, capture silent conversions, report Outbound to Signup to Revenue by channel.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh
steps: HubSpot Outbound Campaign + Sign Up props

workflows.title: HubSpot Account Tiering and Scoring
workflows.description: Segment, score, and assign account tiers in HubSpot using CRM data and Clay enrichment to prioritize high-value opportunities.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Content RAG Agent Playbook
workflows.description: Feed data into a database, connect RAG agent in n8n, auto-produce content and video drafts from knowledge base.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: PLG-to-Sales HubSpot Playbook
workflows.description: Product-aware data model, custom objects, product usage sync, fit and usage scoring, automated lead and deal workflows from one workspace.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: LinkedIn-to-Blog Publishing Playbook
workflows.description: Monitor top LinkedIn creators, convert posts to brand-voiced blogs with Claude, Notion approval, auto-publish to Webflow.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: RemoteState Greenfield GTM Engine
workflows.description: Clay + Smartlead + n8n across 250+ domains. OpenAI lead scoring, SDR team 1 to 4 with automation-first playbooks. $180K ARR in 6 months.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: FalconWise MENA ABM Engine
workflows.description: Zero-to-one ABM for MENA cybersecurity: multi-source enrichment, enterprise CISO targeting, co-marketing with 3 regional vendors.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: Personalization 6 Buckets Framework
workflows.description: Complete personalization framework: Strong vs Lite hooks, Camp/No-Camp playbooks, 6 AI prompts for scale.
workflows.author: Rasul Shaikh

workflows.title: 34 Cold Email Templates Library
workflows.description: First touch, follow-up, and re-engagement templates. Combines with 11 GTM plays and signal sourcer workflows.
